security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: asset: blob: data:; script-src 'self' tauri: asset: 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' tauri: asset: ipc: http://ipc.localhost https:; img-src 'self' tauri: asset: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.longDescription: Proof-of-concept desktop launcher for RGC-BASIC raylib WebGL2 runtime.
